description: 喜欢。like + 名词 / like + to do。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like coffee.","zh":"我喜欢咖啡。"}]

description: 想要。want + 名词 / want + to do。
examples_json: [{"en":"I want a new phone.","zh":"我想要新手机。"}]

description: 需要。need + 名词 / need + to do。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need help.","zh":"我需要帮助。"}]

description: 有/拥有。have + 名词。第三人称用has。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a brother.","zh":"我有一个兄弟。"}]

description: 做/干。也用作疑问句助动词：Do you...?
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have a pen?","zh":"你有笔吗？"}]

description: do not缩写。构成否定：I don't...。
examples_json: [{"en":"I don't have a car.","zh":"我没有车。"}]

description: 起床。日常最常用动词短语。
